title: RunCommand Command
description: Execute an arbitrary Rhino command string and return captured command-window output. Escape hatch for commands not yet wrapped by typed MCP tools.

command.description: Rhino command string to execute, e.g. "_Box 0,0,0 10,10,10". Prefix with underscore to force English command names.

echo.description: If true, echo the command in the Rhino command window as it runs.
